summary: Simplified Kanban Cards - All 12 features verified successfully. Kanban cards now show ONLY minimal content: logo (24px) + school name (13px/600) + status indicator (dot + label) + optional state context. NO CTAs, timing labels, or 'You' tags visible on any Kanban card. Priority view retains full action UI with CTAs, timing, and owner tags.
critical_code_review_comments: KanbanCard component correctly implements minimal UI - only LogoBox + name + StatusIndicator + filtered context
getCardContext() filter correctly excludes timing-related reasonShort ('overdue', 'due ', 'days since', 'on track')
No CTA arrow/text elements in KanbanCard markup - intentionally removed
No OwnerTag component used in KanbanCard - intentionally removed
LogoBox from shared pipeline-design.js correctly at 24x24px with 18px inner logo
StatusIndicator displays dot + label with correct colors: red/Needs attention, amber/Needs action, green/On track
context_for_next_testing_agent: Simplified Kanban cards complete. All 12 features verified: (1) Kanban cards show ONLY logo+name+status+context, (2) NO CTA arrows, (3) NO timing labels, (4) NO 'You' tags, (5) Status system consistent (red/amber/green), (6) Context shows ONLY state info, (7) 24px LogoBox, (8) 13px/600 school name, (9) Drag-and-drop works, (10) Cards clickable, (11) Toggle works, (12) Priority view retains full UI. Test data: Added=3, Outreach=2, Talking=1, Visit=1, Offered=0. Context lines: 'Ready for first contact' (Creighton), 'Coach assigned a task' (Florida).

verified_features.1_kanban_minimal_content: PASS - Cards show only: logo + school name + status (dot + label)
verified_features.2_no_cta_arrows: PASS - No '→', 'Start Outreach', 'Re-engage', 'Take Action' on any card
verified_features.3_no_timing_labels: PASS - No 'Overdue Xd', 'Due today' on any Kanban card
verified_features.4_no_you_owner_tags: PASS - No 'You' owner tags on Kanban cards
verified_features.5_status_system_consistent: PASS - red 'Needs attention' (6), amber 'Needs action' (1), green 'On track' (1)
verified_features.6_context_state_only: PASS - Only state context: 'Ready for first contact', 'Coach assigned a task'
verified_features.9_drag_and_drop: PASS - 7 draggable elements, all cards draggable
verified_features.11_toggle_works: PASS - Priority/Pipeline toggle switches views correctly
verified_features.12_priority_full_ui: PASS - Priority view shows CTAs, timing labels, owner tags
